metadata.description: Subnet Name for the Virtual Network
The ID of the network connection

networkConnectionId.value: [resourceId('Microsoft.DevCenter/networkConnections', format('netCon-{0}-{1}', parameters('subnetName'), uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, format('{0}-{1}', parameters('virtualNetworkName'), parameters('subnetName')))))]

metadata.description: The name of the network connection
The domain join type of the network connection

domainJoinType.value: [reference(resourceId('Microsoft.DevCenter/networkConnections', format('netCon-{0}-{1}', parameters('subnetName'), uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, format('{0}-{1}', parameters('virtualNetworkName'), parameters('subnetName'))))), '2024-10-01-preview').domainJoinType]

subnetId.value: [reference(resourceId('Microsoft.DevCenter/networkConnections', format('netCon-{0}-{1}', parameters('subnetName'), uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, format('{0}-{1}', parameters('virtualNetworkName'), parameters('subnetName'))))), '2024-10-01-preview').subnetId]
